description:
Hi team,

Mateo here. My online order from last week arrived with one of the cold brew bottles cracked and leaking. Everything else was fine. Could you arrange a replacement for the damaged bottle? Order number is in my account. Happy to send a photo.

Thanks,
Mateo
subject: Damaged bottle in online order — replacement request

description:
Hi team,

Linda here. The oat milk latte at the Bedford Avenue location tasted noticeably different this week — the foam wasn't steaming the same way. Wanted to flag in case the milk supplier changed. Otherwise a regular and happy with the spot.

Thanks,
Linda
subject: Oat milk latte tasting different at Bedford Avenue

description:
Hi team,

Howard here. Any chance you'll bring back the seasonal pumpkin cold brew this fall? It was my favorite last year and I've been asking at the counter. A heads-up on the release date would be great.

Thanks,
Howard
subject: Will the seasonal pumpkin cold brew return this fall?

description:
Hi team,

Kevin here. I tried to redeem my rewards points at checkout on the website and the discount didn't apply. The points show in my account but the cart total stayed the same. Could you look into it?

Thanks,
Kevin
subject: Rewards points not applying at checkout

description:
Hi team,

Priya here. I'd like to update the shipping address on my subscription before the next box ships. The account still has my old San Jose address. What's the cutoff to change it for this cycle?

Thanks,
Priya
subject: Update shipping address before next subscription box

description:
Hi team,

Nora here. Do any of your blends contain nuts or are processed in a facility with nuts? I have a mild allergy and wanted to check before placing a larger order. Thanks for confirming.

Thanks,
Lily
subject: Allergen question — nut content in blends

description:
Hi team,

Jess here. I saw the giveaway you posted on Instagram but the entry link goes to a 404 page. Wanted to flag it so other people can enter too. Love the new branding by the way.

Thanks,
Jess
subject: Giveaway entry link returns a 404

description:
Hi team,

Tomás here. I was charged twice for the same wholesale order this month — two identical charges on the same card. Could you refund the duplicate? Order reference is in my account history.

Thanks,
Tomás
subject: Duplicate charge on wholesale order — refund request
